input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.1.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.1.5.2
            TITLE: refer to the rules faq on the fsae online website for transponder and rfid tag information

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.1.5.2: Refer to the Rules FAQ on the FSAE Online website for transponder and RFID tag information
VE.1.5.2 Refer to the Rules FAQ on the FSAE Online website for transponder and RFID tag information 
and mounting details

final_answer: rule VE.1.5.2: Refer to the Rules FAQ on the FSAE Online website for transponder and RFID tag information VE.1.5.2 Refer to the Rules FAQ on the FSAE Online website for transponder and RFID tag information and mounting details
